text: Hi, today I'm going to show you guys how to take off contact lens without touching your eyeballs.
First, you want to wash your hand and dry it completely.
And then use the index finger and the middle finger to open the eye as big as possible.
Pull back the eyelid with both fingers and blink hard at the same time.
Then you will get your contact lens off.
Eyes are very important and sensitive.
So if we can take off our contact lens without touching the eyeballs,
there's a less probability we can get infection.
